mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO WATCH_HISTORY_TBL T USING ( SELECT #{USER_ID} AS USER_ID, #{MOVIE_ID} AS MOVIE_ID, #{TITLE} AS TITLE, #{POSTER_PATH} AS POSTER_PATH, #{GENRES} AS GENRES FROM DUAL ) S ON (T.USER_ID = S.USER_ID AND T.MOVIE_ID = S.MOVIE_ID)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.WATCH_DATE = SYSDATE
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (HISTORY_NO, USER_ID, MOVIE_ID, TITLE, POSTER_PATH, GENRES, WATCH_DATE) VALUES (WATCH_HISTORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, S.USER_ID, S.MOVIE_ID, S.TITLE, S.POSTER_PATH, S.GENRES, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM WATCH_HISTORY_TBL WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID} ORDER BY WATCH_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WATCH_HISTORY_TBL WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
